prompt: SUBJECT: plump beef and cilantro dumplings with pleated ivory-cream wrappers arranged in a round bamboo steamer in natural wood tones, wisps of pale steam, small fresh green cilantro accents (the attached photo shows what the dish looks like; do NOT copy its tight cropping). STYLE: hand-tinted chromolithograph engraving matching the attached voucher's food illustration - warm ochre-sepia linework, flat natural color washes, no photorealism. FRAMING (critical): the ENTIRE subject must sit fully inside the frame with a wide empty margin of at least 15 percent of the canvas on ALL four sides; nothing may touch or be cut off by any edge. GROUND: fully transparent background, nothing else; no text, no border, no shadow, no yellow or gold color cast.
